name: Ancient Gear Fusion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>古代の機械融合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アンティーク・ギアフュージョン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Fusion Summon 1 "Ancient Gear" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material. If you use "Ancient Gear Golem" or "Ancient Gear Golem - Ultimate Pound" you control as Fusion Material, you can also use monsters from your Deck as material.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 "Ancient Gear" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material. If you use "Ancient Gear Golem" or "Ancient Gear Golem - Ultimate Pound" you control as Fusion Material, you can also use monsters from your Deck as material.

action: Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Deck as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
